timestamps.title: google.com
timestamps.description: Larry Page and Sergey Brin bought the domain 'google.com'

timestamps.title: Google Inc.
timestamps.description: Larry Page and Sergey Brin officially incorporated Google Inc.

timestamps.title: Go Public
timestamps.description: Google held its initial public offering (IPO) and became a publicly traded company.

timestamps.title: The Facebook
timestamps.description: Mark Zuckerberg launched 'The Facebook' from his dorm room at Harvard University.

timestamps.title: Facebook Inc.
timestamps.description: Facebook was officially incorporated as Facebook Inc.

timestamps.title: Go Public
timestamps.description: Facebook held its initial public offering (IPO) and became a publicly traded company.

timestamps.title: Snapchat Launched
timestamps.description: Evan Spiegel, Bobby Murphy, and Reggie Brown launched Snapchat, a multimedia messaging app.

timestamps.title: Rebranding to Snap Inc.
timestamps.description: Snapchat rebranded itself as Snap Inc. to reflect its expansion beyond just the Snapchat app.

timestamps.title: Go Public
timestamps.description: Snap Inc. held its initial public offering (IPO) and became a publicly traded company.

timestamps.title: Twitter Launched
timestamps.description: Jack Dorsey, Biz Stone, and Evan Williams launched Twitter, a microblogging platform.

timestamps.title: Twitter Inc.
timestamps.description: Twitter was officially incorporated as Twitter Inc.

timestamps.title: Go Public
timestamps.description: Twitter held its initial public offering (IPO) and became a publicly traded company.

timestamps.title: Uber Launched
timestamps.description: Garrett Camp and Travis Kalanick launched Uber, a ride-hailing service.

timestamps.title: Uber Inc.
timestamps.description: Uber was officially incorporated as Uber Inc.

timestamps.title: Go Public
timestamps.description: Uber held its initial public offering (IPO) and became a publicly traded company.
